title: polyscias mollis
intro: Polyscias mollis, also known as the velvet tree or umbrella tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Araliaceae. This plant is native to tropical Africa and Asia, and its leaves have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Polyscias mollis include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. The leaves can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal use, and are also used in traditional remedies to treat various ailments.
